uk.d: n a monarchy in northwestern Europe occupying most of the British Isles; divided into England and Scotland and Wales and Northern Ireland; `Great Britain' is often used loosely to refer to the United Kingdom

uk-based.t: n. 英国的，总部在英国的，联合王国的

uka.t: abbr. United Kingdom Alliance 英国联盟; unicompartmental knee arthroplasty 单腔膝关节成形术; unicondylar knee arthroplasty 单髁的膝关节成形术; United Klans of America 美国三K党联盟

ukaea.t: abbr. 英国原子能局（United Kingdom Atomic Energy Authority）

ukase.t: n. 敕令, 圣旨, 谕旨
ukase.d: n. an edict of the Russian tsar

uke.t: n. 尤克里里琴(吉他型四弦拨奏乐器)
uke.d: n. a small guitar having four strings

ukeleles.t: (ukelele 的复数)  尤克里里琴

ukias.t: abbr. United Kingdom Immigrants Advisory Service 英国移民咨询服务

uko.t: abbr. United Karen Organization 克伦族联合组织（缅甸）

ukr.t: abbr. Ukraine 乌克兰; Ukrainian 乌克兰人（语）; 乌克兰的; 乌克兰人（语）的

ukraine.t: n. 乌克兰（原苏联一加盟共和国, 现已独立）
ukraine.d: n. a republic in southeastern Europe; formerly a European soviet; the center of the original Russian state which came into existence in the ninth century

ukrainian.t: a. 乌克兰的；乌克兰人的
ukrainian.d:
n. the Slavic language spoken in the Ukraine
a. of or relating to or characteristic of Ukraine or its people or culture

ukrainians.d: n. the Slavic language spoken in the Ukraine

uku.t: abbr. Nuku, Papua New Guinea 巴布亚新几内亚，努库机场（代码）

ukulele.d: n a small guitar having four strings

ukuleles.t: (ukulele 的复数) n. 尤克里里琴
ukuleles.d:
plural of ukulele
n a small guitar having four strings
